revision_summary:
Six targeted fixes required before Stage 3 is production-ready:

1. SPEECH DISFLUENCY MISREAD (state_changes[0], ts 00:56): Correct the reading of 'I've been sorry' — this is a speech disfluency/self-correction ('I've been — sorry — I've been busy'), not an apology expressing obligation. Remove the 'feels some obligation to engage' inference; the behavioral signal (volunteering three days) is sufficient evidence for the state_delta without the over-read.

2. CREDIT-QUESTION SEQUENCE INVERSION (rep_intent.evidence[1], ts 01:33): Correct the stated sequence. Francisco raised credit at [01:18] BEFORE the scheduling pivot at [01:33], not after. The critique of the sequencing is valid but the description of the order is inverted. Fix the sequence description to match the transcript.

3. PARTIAL FLIP ON CREDIT-QUESTION HYPOTHESIS (cherry_pick_moments[2], ts 01:18): The strategic read ('Francisco raised credit early to protect his pay-period tier') should be partially validated, not dismissed. On a recycled lead with a known prior credit DQ, surfacing the qualifier before fully committing the slot is defensible. The real coaching gap is the absence of a resolution path for 'I'll check when I get home,' not the timing of the question. Revise the alternative_hypothesis disposition accordingly.

4. SCHEMA REFERENCE CORRECTIONS: (a) cherry_pick_moments[3] (ts 01:33): Remove the bill_collection.stewart_automated_bill_capture reference — it applies to bill follow-up, not credit follow-up. Flag as a schema gap instead. (b) cherry_pick_moments[6] (ts 01:09): Remove the verify.interest_in_solar reference — Carter volunteering availability is a scheduling cooperation signal, not an interest-in-solar signal. Note the absence of a schema item for this signal type.

5. BUTTON-UP OVERSTATEMENT (cherry_pick_moments[4], ts 01:57): Correct the claim that 'no appointment datetime confirmed verbally.' The transcript shows '02:00. 02:00. K. 2PM.' and 'Monday. K.' — day and time were verbally confirmed. Revise to: datetime was confirmed but all other button-up elements (one-hour block, phone/computer anchor, 'is that fair' handshake, tieback text) are absent.

6. ADD THREE MISSED MOMENTS: (a) ts 00:11 — Carter is returning a missed call (inbound callback), a behavioral warmth signal that strengthens the starting_state read and makes Francisco's passive opener even more notable. (b) ts 00:18 — explicit recycled-lead confirmation should trigger a note that bill collection skip may be correct procedure (bill possibly on file per schema recycled_lead entry), not a gap. (c) ts 02:07 — Carter's warm closing energy ('K. Awesome. Alright.') should be grounded in the handoff brief as evidence the closer is approaching a genuinely warm lead despite the conditional booking structure.
